creator: eugene@zhegan.in
text:
So.

Guys at net-snmp team wrote that they fixed that prTable bug in all 
branches, so I tested the new 5.7.2-rc1 release candidate and here are 
the results:

- prTable is working
- no these subjected errors at all
- no memory leak

Right now it's running on my production server like 4 or 5 hours. Seems 
to be fine. I'd recommend it for committing to ports, seems to be way 
better that the 5.7.1 release.
